title: A Circular Economy Act that works [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Europe’s circular transition has stalled because recycled materials markets are fragmented, quality is uneven and virgin materials win on price. The Circular Economy Act can change this by harmonising rules, strengthening demand, de-risking investments and building trust through digital tools.
